title: Simply Great Vanilla
description: A modpack simply improving vanilla Minecraft without adding any new content
body:
Modpack that optimizes and improves vanilla minecraft without adding new content. Perfect for playing multiplayer or starting a classic singleplayer world.


This modpack is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International.

It includes various mods created by their respective authors. All mods retain their original licenses and ownership.
Full credit goes to the mod developers — without them, this modpack wouldn’t exist.

If you’re one of the authors and would like to request changes or removal, feel free to contact me
